compiled_state.title: Update CLAUDE.md Quick Reference and Architecture sections for artifact auto-update
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
GREEN

## Description
Update CLAUDE.md Quick Reference table and Architecture section to reflect the new artifact auto-update system.

### Updates:
1. Quick Reference table: add dso update-artifacts row with purpose
2. Architecture / Hook architecture: mention check-artifact-versions.sh as SessionStart hook with 24h cache, version-change bust, plugin-source-repo guard
3. Architecture section: note that installed artifacts carry version stamps and dso update-artifacts is the update mechanism

### CLAUDE.md bloat-review:
doc_target: CLAUDE.md
bloat_review_required: true
max_tokens_budget: 12000

### TDD Exemption Justification
test-exempt: criterion 3 (static assets only — documentation markdown file with no executable behavior)

### Files to modify
- CLAUDE.md

## File Impact
| File | Action |
|------|--------|
| CLAUDE.md | modify |

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] CLAUDE.md Quick Reference contains update-artifacts row
  Verify: grep -q 'update-artifacts' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/CLAUDE.md
- [ ] CLAUDE.md Architecture mentions check-artifact-versions.sh
  Verify: grep -q 'check-artifact-versions' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/CLAUDE.md
- [ ] CLAUDE.md mentions version stamp mechanism
  Verify: grep -q 'dso-version' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/CLAUDE.md

## Escalation Policy
Proceed unless a significant assumption is required. Document all assumptions.

comments.body: CHECKPOINT: CLAUDE.md updated with 3 targeted additions — (1) Quick Reference table row for dso update-artifacts (line 39), (2) Artifact version check hook entry in Hook architecture section (line 50), (3) Artifact version stamps note in Architecture section (line 88). All acceptance criteria terms verified: update-artifacts, check-artifact-versions, dso-version. No commit per task instructions.
comments.author: Test

comments.body: CHECKPOINT:batch-complete — Done ✓ — CLAUDE.md updated with 3 concise additions.
comments.author: Test
